name: The Mansion's Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Fresh epazote, chopped (or 1 tablespoon chopped Fresh cilantro)
1 Cooked chicken breast, cut into strips
3 Corn tortillas, cut into strips - fried crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Saute the tortillas with garlic and epazote over medium heat until the tortillas are soft. Add onion puree and fresh tomato puree, then bring to a boil.
3. Stir in cumin, chili powder, bay leaves, canned tomato puree, and chicken stock. Bring to a boil again, then reduce heat to simmer.
4. Season with salt and cayenne pepper to taste and cook, stirring frequently for 30 minutes. Skim fat from the surface if necessary.
5. Strain the soup into warm bowls. Garnish each bowl with an equal portion of chicken breast, avocado, shredded cheese, and crisp tortilla strips.
6. Serve immediately. Soup may be made ahead of time and gently reheated before serving with garnishes.
